hero.question: Will Anthropic have the best AI model at the end of March 2026?
hero.prob_take: The 3.9 point dump from 96.8% signals serious conviction selling, probably Claude 3.5 Sonnet stalling on benchmarks while GPT-4o and o1 keep iterating, and smart money is hedging their Anthropic bets before the final quarter push. At 92.9% you're essentially paying for perfection when "best" is subjective enough that benchmark volatility alone should keep this closer to 85%, especially with OpenAI's December refresh and potential Grok improvements still in play.

daily_take.headline: Anthropic's AI Crown Slipping. Market Just Woke Up to Reality.
daily_take.deck: Anthropic's best-model odds dropped 3.9 points to 92.9% in 24 hours, signaling real uncertainty about whether Claude stays on top through March 2026. The market was pricing this like a coronation. It's not. OpenAI's o1 is shipping, Grok is improving, and Google's Gemini keeps iterating. The smart play: sell this crown at 92%+. A 15-point drop in the next quarter looks cheap.
